name: papermate
description: Paper writing harness for Codex: figures, LaTeX checks, writing QA, and submission readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Paper writing QA, figure checks, LaTeX compile audits, and submission readiness.
interface.longDescription: Papermate packages paper-writing workflow skills for LaTeX compile checks, publication figure QA, section reference guards, writing quality audits, paper synchronization, and final pre-submit adversarial review.
defaultPrompt: Check this paper build for LaTeX warnings.
Run figure QA on the latest plot.
Do a pre-submit challenge for this paper.
